states.name: Lillian
states.title: Spritely Spearmaster
states.description:
Lillian Rosalinde von Dreyer was born with a certain problem. Since its founding, her bloodline has been known for two things: indefatigable spirit and truly enormous size. The story goes that, after giving birth to five strapping boys, her mother swore that her sixth would be the strongest warrior of them all. So, naturally, Lillian arrived not only small for her family, but small for any Hymelian.

Only the foolish dare bring up this little legend around her, however. She tends to challenge anyone who does to a duel, to prove that her mother's prediction was in no way false.

states.name: Lillian
states.title: Spritely Spearmaster
states.description:
Lillian's father worried that having five elder brothers might overwhelm a dainty little girl. However, his worry soon proved to be quite unfounded. More often than not, Lillian was the one who sent her brothers running, beating them back from her dolls with a tree branch spear. When they heard of the Hymelian princess's penchant for combat, Lillian's parents sent her to be her handmaiden -- or perhaps, more accurately, her apprentice.

 Though Maxima fights with a sword instead of a spear, Lillian has taken her aggressive philosophy quite to heart. In battle, she ensures her opponents never gain an inch on her allies, no matter what she has to do.
